title: Leadership of Indigenous Communities and Collaboration in the Development of Major Projects
content:
## Leadership of Indigenous Communities and Collaboration in the Development of Major Projects
Join us for a discussion with prominent leaders from Quebec and Canada on the leadership, contributions and crucial role of Indigenous communities in the planning and implementation of major projects.
This conference will feature a series of panels comprised of representatives from indigenous communities and organizations, the private sector and government who will discuss a wide range of topics, including:
- Building successful partnerships with Indigenous communities;
- Indigenous perspectives and leadership in sustainable project development;
- Future opportunities for Indigenous leadership, partnerships and participation in projects based in Quebec and elsewhere.
Note: The presentation will take place in our Montreal office and will be offered only in French.
This program qualifies for up to 3 hours of CPD credit under the mandatory education regimes in British Columbia and Ontario.
Barreau du Québec Continuing Education: We have submitted this program for recognition as an eligible educational activity under the Barreau du Québec mandatory education regime.
For questions about this event, please contact montrealevents@mccarthy.ca .
11:45 a.m. – 12:00 p.m. – Registration 12:00 p.m. – 12:45 p.m. – Lunch 12:45 p.m. – 1:00 p.m. – Opening Remarks 1:00 p.m. – 4:45 p.m. – Conference 4:45 p.m. – 7:00 p.m. – Reception
- Law Society of Ontario – Substantive
- Law Society of British Columbia – Substantive
